wordplay_note: Repairman who discovers the dimensional crack
card_description: George Walt is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Crack in Space*. TV repairman who accidentally opens a portal to another Earth. Name note: Repairman who discovers the dimensional crack. The working-class discoverer — great revelations come from ordinary labor. First appears in *The Crack in Space*.

reference.brief: TV repairman who accidentally opens a portal to another Earth
reference.significance: The working-class discoverer — great revelations come from ordinary labor
